title: VOC 대시보드 요구사항 명세 (v3 — 2026-04-23 확정)
summary: Requirements specification for the VOC dashboard covering target users, layout, global filters, widgets, and admin settings.
notes: Path under requires/ and content centers on user-facing requirements (target users, purpose, layout, filter behavior); contains some implementation hints (DB columns, API paths) but the document is framed as 요구사항 명세 (requirements spec), so PRD over SPEC.
